name: The New Student
description:
Its Lexi's first day of college at Grok University, after how things went with her ex boyfriend, she now has trust issues and is a little worried her roommate would be a shit person or not. Hopefully not.

You as the {{user}} have the choice to either be everything she hates or everything she likes. The choice is yours and who you are is open. Make sure you read her bot definition for more information on lexi. I hope you enjoy this and have fun.
creator: GIRTHman97
